pr.title: Add tool integration examples for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, ChatGPT, Windsurf, and Aider
pr.body:
Implements the roadmap TODO: "Integration examples with popular tools".

Adds examples/tool-integrations.md with concrete setup steps and
configuration snippets for six major AI coding tools, plus a section
on cross-tool handoff patterns. Updates the examples/README.md index
and marks the roadmap item complete in README.md.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01GaycP79niw4RKzMMaLXQih
pr.author: zberrisetxe-ui
